subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Thy mention hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One; wherefore the Most Exalted Pen hath turned unto thee with these sublime and wondrous words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد ذکرت در ساحت مظلوم مذکور لذا قلم اعلی بتو متوجه و باینکلمات منیعه بدیعه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
